title: Canonical contracts v1
objective: Versioned typed contracts: property profile, source fact/provenance, coverage status, analysis state machine (PRD 32.3/32.1/9/12); shared by API, workers, frontend, reports. Must fix M0-T004 G3 defects D1 (provenance schema under-enforces PRD s9 mandatory fields: dataset_version, confidence, user_confirmed_or_overridden, conflict_status; provenance_ref must be required where material), D2 (invented enums - borough spellings, conflict resolution/status - and permissive BBL pattern; validate against real connector outputs documented in docs/research/ from M0-T002), D3 (contracts CI validation upgrades from parse+keys to JSON Schema meta-schema validation, implemented inside .github/scripts/validate_contracts.py only). Also fixes doc defects D4 (disclaimer apostrophe glyph vs PRD s29) and D5 (stale root README job list; stale contracts README key list).
business_reason: One canonical property profile; prevents competing schemas (PRD 32.3); provenance completeness is a legal-defensibility requirement (PRD 9)
inputs: docs/research/ M0-T002 Geoclient/GeoSearch findings (real field shapes for D2 enum validation)
outputs: packages/contracts/schemas/v1/ property_profile, source_fact/provenance, coverage_status, analysis_state (+ any new: rule evaluation trace, scenario, report evidence item stubs if in scope of v1)
forbidden_paths: .github/workflows/** (ci.yml owned by M0-T006 rework; script-only changes here)

acceptance_scenarios.expected: each schema validates against its declared JSON Schema meta-schema (draft 2020-12); validate_contracts.py enforces this and CI contracts job passes unchanged

acceptance_scenarios.input: source_fact/provenance schema vs PRD s9 list
acceptance_scenarios.expected: every PRD s9 mandatory provenance field is required in the schema (source id, original field name, original value, normalized value, retrieved timestamp, dataset_version, effective date where available, bbl, confidence, user_confirmed_or_overridden, conflict_status); a fixture missing any one of them fails validation

acceptance_scenarios.input: borough, conflict status/resolution enums and BBL pattern vs documented M0-T002 connector outputs
acceptance_scenarios.expected: enums and BBL pattern match documented official API values with citation comments in the schema or README; no invented spellings remain; BBL pattern rejects malformed examples (wrong length, non-numeric, borough 0/6)
exactly the 14 PRD states, no extras; invalid state value fails validation

acceptance_scenarios.input: deliberately broken fixture (bad meta-schema keyword, missing required provenance field, unknown coverage status)
acceptance_scenarios.expected: validate_contracts.py exits nonzero with a clear per-file error

acceptance_scenarios.input: existing CI contracts job + doc fixes
acceptance_scenarios.expected: CI contracts job still green; disclaimer matches PRD s29 byte-for-byte (D4); root README describes the actual four CI jobs and npm ci (D5); contracts README key list matches shipped schemas

risks: Contract v1 shape decisions constrain all downstream modules; keep versioned and additive
D2 enum grounding limited to M0-T002 research coverage; unknown values must be modeled as open-but-flagged rather than guessed

progress_log.message: G0 contracting: packet filled (scope, scenarios, D1-D5 remediation). ci.yml deliberately excluded from scope to avoid overlap with M0-T006 rework; D3 implemented in validate_contracts.py only. Launch gated on M0-T004 acceptance.
